case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. NIXON ELY SORIANO MIRANDA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANGEL GARCIA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED FEB-04-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MIRANDA, NIXON ELY SORIANO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIRANDA, NIXON ELY SORIANO $535.15 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $615.15 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $535.13 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MIRANDA, NIXON ELY SORIANO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY ANGEL GARCIA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NIXON ELY SORIANO MIRANDA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
